title: Old Scenery
description: A nostalgic experience you haven't seen yet
body:
![page-1](https://github.com/twoiinfarkt/oldscenery-media/blob/main/oldscenery-p1.png?raw=true)
<details>
<summary>Leftover details</summary>

* **Restrained World:** No villages, outposts, portals, or loot rooms
* **Atmospheric Fog:** Completely improved. Makes forests quieter and nights much deeper
* **Immersive Mechanics:** Backpacks, chests, and item carrying
* **No Hand-holding:** No markers, arrows, or quest hints
* **Beta Aesthetics:** Richer sounds, squared shadows.
* **Copper is Useful:** Added a full, meaningful tier of vanilla-style copper tools and armor.
* **Painting:** A very subtle, painting mechanic.
* **The Far Lands:** They are real. Travel to the legendary **12,550,800** coordinates to see the world break down into nostalgic terrain walls.
</details>
